sources.title: Procore Vendor Performance Report
sources.architectureUse: Confirms vendor/subcontractor performance analytics can leverage Commitments, Submittals, Punch List, and RFIs as source context while preserving Procore ownership.

sources.title: Procore Review a Submitted Prequalification Form
sources.architectureUse: Supports reviewer/comment/status patterns and financial-category visibility separation.

sources.title: Procore Prequalifications Permissions
sources.architectureUse: Supports explicit permission/action matrix for sensitive subcontractor risk data.

sources.title: Autodesk Subcontractor Qualification Best Practices
sources.architectureUse: Supports project-based, comprehensive, practical, yes-but risk-control posture instead of absolute blacklist outputs.

sources.title: Microsoft Graph listItem resource
sources.architectureUse: Supports SharePoint list-backed target record planning, fieldValueSet mapping, list item versions, and delta posture.

sources.title: Require approval of items in a list or library
sources.architectureUse: Supports draft visibility, approval status, and versioning concepts for sensitive scorecard publication rules.

sources.title: OWASP Application Security Verification Standard
sources.architectureUse: Supports explicit verification requirements for access control, validation, logging, API security, and sensitive data protection.

sources.title: WCAG 2.2 New Guidelines
sources.architectureUse: Supports keyboard/focus/target-size/redundant-entry acceptance requirements for scorecard forms and detail drawers.
